samples.gvd:
module fsm
(
    input IN,
    input CLK,
    input RST,
    output reg MATCH
);

reg [2:0] state, next_state;

parameter S0 = 3'b000, S1 = 3'b001, S2 = 3'b010, S3 = 3'b011, S4 = 3'b100, S5 = 3'b101, S6 = 3'b110, S7 = 3'b111;

always @(posedge CLK or posedge RST) begin
    if (RST) begin
        state <= S0;
        MATCH <= 1'b0;
    end
    else begin
        state <= next_state;
        case (state)
            S0: begin
                if (IN) begin
                    next_state <= S1;
                end
                else begin
                    next_state <= S0;
                end
            end
            S1: begin
                if (IN) begin
                    next_state <= S1;
                end
                else begin
                    next_state <= S2;
                end
            end
            S2: begin
                if (IN) begin
                    next_state <= S1;
                end
                else begin
                    next_state <= S3;
                end
            end
            S3: begin
                if (IN) begin
                    next_state <= S4;
                end
                else begin
                    next_state <= S0;
                end
            end
            S4: begin
                if (IN) begin
                    next_state <= S1;
                    MATCH <= 1'b1;
                end
                else begin
                    next_state <= S0;
                end
            end
            default: begin
                next_state <= S0;
            end
        endcase
    end
end

endmodule
samples.xml_description:
<module id="fsm">
    <description>Implement a Mealy FSM detection circuit that detects a single-bit input IN. When the input is 10011, output MATCH is 1, and MATCH is 0 in other cases. Support for continuous input and loop detection.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="IN">Input signal to the FSM.</input>
        <input id="CLK">Clock signal used for synchronous operation.</input>
        <input id="RST">Reset signal to initialize the FSM.</input>
        <output id="MATCH">Output signal indicating a match condition based on the FSM state.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <parameter id="S0">Initial state of the FSM.</parameter>
        <parameter id="S1">State of the FSM when the input is 1.</parameter>
        <parameter id="S2">State of the FSM when the input is 0.</parameter>
        <parameter id="S3">State of the FSM when the input is 1.</parameter>
        <parameter id="S4">State of the FSM when the input is 1.</parameter>
        <parameter id="S5">State of the FSM when the input is 0.</parameter>
        <parameter id="S6">State of the FSM when the input is 0.</parameter>
        <parameter id="S7">State of the FSM when the input is 1.</parameter>
        <parameter id="S8">State of the FSM when the input is 1.</parameter>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description>
        <reg id="state" type="sequential_logic">Current state of the FSM.</reg>
        <reg id="next_state" type="sequential_logic">Next state of the FSM.</reg>
        <reg id="match_reg" type="sequential_logic">Register to store the MATCH output.</reg>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
        <sequential_logic>
            <always>
                <trigger>
                    <event>initialization</event>
                    <condition>
                        <and>
                            <true>1</true>
                        </and>
                    </condition>
                    <action>
                        <assign>
                            <assign_lhs>match_reg</assign_lhs>
                            <assign_rhs>1'b0</assign_rhs>
                        </assign>
                    </action>
                </trigger>
                <trigger>
                    <event>posedge of CLK or negedge of RST</event>
                    <condition>
                        <and>
                            <true>1</true>
                        </and>
                    </condition>
                    <action>
                        <assign>
                            <assign_lhs>state</assign_lhs>
                            <assign_rhs>next_state</assign_rhs>
                        </assign>
                    </action>
                </trigger>
            </always>
            <always>
                <trigger>
                    <event>initialization</event>
                    <condition>
                        <and>
                            <true>1</true>
                        </and>
                    </condition>
                    <action>
                        <assign>
                            <assign_lhs>next_state</assign_lhs>
                            <assign_rhs>"S0"</assign_rhs>
                        </assign>
                    </action>
                </trigger>
                <trigger>
                    <event>IN or state</event>
                    <condition>
                        <and>
                            <true>1</true>
                        </and>
                    </condition>
                    <action>
                        <case>
                            <case_expr>state</case_expr>
                            <case_value>"S0"</case_value>
                            <case_action>
                                <assign>
                                    <assign_lhs>next_state</assign_lhs>
                                    <assign_rhs>
                                        <cond>
                                            <cond_expr>IN</cond_expr>
                                            <cond_then>"S1"</cond_then>
                                            <cond_else>"S0"</cond_else>
                                        </cond>
                                    </assign_rhs>
                                </assign>
                            </case_action>
                            <case_value>"S1"</case_value>
                            <case_action>
                                <assign>
                                    <assign_lhs>next_state</assign_lhs>
                                    <assign_rhs>
                                        <cond>
                                            <cond_expr>IN</cond_expr>
                                            <cond_then>"S1"</cond_then>
                                            <cond_else>"S2"</cond_else>
                                        </cond>
                                    </assign_rhs>
                                </assign>
                            </case_action>
                            <case_value>"S2"</case_value>
                            <case_action>
                                <assign>
                                    <assign_lhs>next_state</assign_lhs>
                                    <assign_rhs>
                                        <cond>
                                            <cond_expr>IN</cond_expr>
                                            <cond_then>"S3"</cond_then>
                                            <cond_else>"S0"</cond_else>
                                        </cond>
                                    </assign_rhs>
                                </assign>
                            </case_action>
                            <case_value>"S3"</case_value>
                            <case_action>
                                <assign>
                                    <assign_lhs>next_state</assign_lhs>
                                    <assign_rhs>
                                        <cond>
                                            <cond_expr>IN</cond_expr>
                                            <cond_then>"S4"</cond_then>
                                            <cond_else>"S2"</cond_else>
                                        </cond>
                                    </assign_rhs>
                                </assign>
                            </case_action>
                            <case_value>"S4"</case_value>
                            <case_action>
                                <assign>
                                    <assign_lhs>next_state</assign_lhs>
                                    <assign_rhs>
                                        <cond>
                                            <cond_expr>IN</cond_expr>
                                            <cond_then>"S4"</cond_then>
                                            <cond_else>"S2"</cond_else>
                                        </cond>
                                    </assign_rhs>
                                </assign>
                            </case_action>
                            <case_value>"S5"</case_value>
                            <case_action>
                                <assign>
                                    <assign_lhs>next_state</assign_lhs>
                                    <assign_rhs>"S0"</assign_rhs>
                                </assign>
                            </case_action>
                            <case_value>"S6"</case_value>
                            <case_action>
                                <assign>
                                    <assign_lhs>next_state</assign_lhs>
                                    <assign_rhs>"S0"</assign_rhs>
                                </assign>
                            </case_action>
                            <case_value>"S7"</case_value>
                            <case_action>
                                <assign>
                                    <assign_lhs>next_state</assign_lhs>
                                    <assign_rhs>"S0"</assign_rhs>
                                </assign>
                            </case_action>
                            <case_value>"S8"</case_value>
                            <case_action>
                                <assign>
                                    <assign_lhs>next_state</assign_lhs>
                                    <assign_rhs>"S0"</assign_rhs>
                                </assign>
                            </case_action>
                        </case>
                    </action>
                </trigger>
            </always>
        </sequential_logic>
        <combinational_logic>
            <always>
                <trigger>
                    <event>initialization</event>
                    <condition>
                        <and>
                            <true>1</true>
                        </and>
                    </condition>
                    <action>
                        <assign>
                            <assign_lhs>MATCH</assign_lhs>
                            <assign_rhs>match_reg</assign_rhs>
                        </assign>
                    </action>
                </trigger>
                <trigger>
                    <event>IN or state</event>
                    <condition>
                        <and>
                            <true>1</true>
                        </and>
                    </condition>
                    <action>
                        <case>
                            <case_expr>state</case_expr>
                            <case_value>"S0"</case_value>
                            <case_action/>
                            <case_value>"S1"</case_value>
                            <case_action/>
                            <case_value>"S2"</case_value>
                            <case_action/>
                            <case_value>"S3"</case_value>
                            <case_action/>
                            <case_value>"S4"</case_value>
                            <case_action>
                                <assign>
                                    <assign_lhs>MATCH</assign_lhs>
                                    <assign_rhs>
                                        <cond>
                                            <cond_expr>IN</cond_expr>
                                            <cond_then>1'b0</cond_then>
                                            <cond_else>1'b1</cond_else>
                                        </cond>
                                    </assign_rhs>
                                </assign>
                            </case_action>
                            <case_value>"S5"</case_value>
                            <case_action>
                                <assign>
                                    <assign_lhs>MATCH</assign_lhs>
                                    <assign_rhs>1'b0</assign_rhs>
                                </assign>
                            </case_action>
                            <case_value>"S6"</case_value>
                            <case_action>
                                <assign>
                                    <assign_lhs>MATCH</assign_lhs>
                                    <assign_rhs>1'b0</assign_rhs>
                                </assign>
                            </case_action>
                            <case_value>"S7"</case_value>
                            <case_action>
                                <assign>
                                    <assign_lhs>MATCH</assign_lhs>
                                    <assign_rhs>1'b0</assign_rhs>
                                </assign>
                            </case_action>
                            <case_value>"S8"</case_value>
                            <case_action>
                                <assign>
                                    <assign_lhs>MATCH</assign_lhs>
                                    <assign_rhs>1'b0</assign_rhs>
                                </assign>
                            </case_action>
                        </case>
                    </action>
                </trigger>
            </always>
        </combinational_logic>
    </implementation>
</module>
